{{Infobox group
| name = Twin Star Sect
| introduced = Reaper
}}

''See also: [[Twin Star Sect Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Twin Star]] Sect is an organization that originated as a fabrication used to provide the appearance of having a powerful backing. While it was initially presented by [[Eithan]] as an ancient group led by the [[Sage of Twin Stars]], it is actually a newer entity established to provide security and structure for those seeking protection during times of chaos. The sect grew rapidly as people sought the perceived safety provided by its association with the [[Void Sage]]. The organization is characterized by its distinctive two-colored star emblem, which appears on banners and robes in various color combinations such as pale blue with orange or red highlights. Its headquarters are located within the territory of [[Serpent's Grave]], featuring specialized facilities like training halls carved from [[dragon]] bone and [[aura]] chambers. The sect is inclusive of various [[Paths]], offering instruction to members regardless of their specific discipline. Leadership and governance involve several key figures, including [[Eithan]] as a founding member and the [[Void Sage]] as its central figurehead. [[Kelsa]] serves in a significant leadership capacity, acting as a voice for the [[Sage]] and overseeing sect members. The organization also utilizes specialized assets, such as the Twin Guardians and the [[Heart of Twin Stars]], to maintain its influence and protect its interests across [[Sacred Valley]].}}

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Twin Star Sect{{!}}Twin Star sect]] is a group represented by [[Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A camp of the [[Twin Star Sect{{!}}Twin Star sect]] sprouted around [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Twin Star Sect]] has a headquarters on the edge of [[Serpent's Grave{{!}}Serpent’s Grave]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Twin Star Sect]] is a group [[Yerin]] asks about.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Twin Star Sect]] has two-colored star banners around the city.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Twin Star Sect]] has light blue robes with orange and red highlights.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Members of the [[Twin Star Sect]] practiced light or dream [[Paths]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The fight is occurring in the [[Twin Star Sect]] compound.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] relocated the [[Twin Star Sect]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Star Sect]] flies the two-colored star.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hall]] has been working with the [[Twin Star Sect]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Some people are calling the [[Twin Star Sect]] a [[Dreadgod cult]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Some students in the [[Twin Star Sect]] spread legends about [[Jai Chen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Star Sect]] flags fly over [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Star Sect]]'s symbol is a split star.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Twin Star Sect]] gathered in [[Lindon]]'s name because people wanted to borrow the protection of the [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Twin Star Sect]] uses blue-and-orange banners.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Twin Star Sect{{!}}Twin Star sect]] supervises the territory where the arena is located.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
